summary: Iteration 35 — checkout wiring for saved addresses + loyalty redemption. Backend regression for /api/account/addresses CRUD + default-flip + auto-promote-on-delete passed 5/5. Backend regression for /api/points/balance + POST/DELETE /api/cart/points passed 2/2. Frontend mobile-viewport flow on /checkout fully verified: default saved address chip auto-selects and pre-fills all 5 form fields (checkout-name, checkout-phone, checkout-line1, checkout-city, checkout-postcode); the saved-addr-new (Use new) chip clears all fields AND re-reveals checkout-save-address-toggle; checkout-points-card renders with PointsRedeemInput; applying 100 pts shows 'Loyalty points (-100 pts)' line in the order summary and reduces the Total by $1.00; tapping Remove reverses it. Note — initial /checkout load was missing SavedAddressesPicker, save-toggle and points-card from the DOM until Expo was restarted (Metro CI mode + stale bundle from previous iteration); after `supervisorctl restart expo` all components rendered correctly. Main agent should verify there is no caching/HMR issue across deploys.
action_items: Inform main agent that Expo Metro is running in CI mode (reloads disabled) — the initial render after this iteration's code change required a manual `sudo supervisorctl restart expo` before SavedAddressesPicker / checkout-points-card / checkout-save-address-toggle appeared in the DOM. Verify this isn't going to bite real users (it shouldn't — they always load a freshly bundled chunk) and consider whether the production CI deploy already accounts for full Metro rebuild.

Minor UX nit (NOT blocking): in PointsRedeemInput.tsx:56 the success toast title 'Min 100 points' uses kind: 'success' — this should be kind: 'error' or 'info' since it represents a validation failure. Cosmetic only.
critical_code_review_comments: checkout.tsx is 581 lines — still under the 700-line soft cap; no split needed yet but worth watching.
SavedAddressesPicker auto-selects the default ONCE on mount via empty deps + eslint-disable; this is intentional and documented in the comment, behaviour verified correct.
On 'Use new' tap (line 68-94 of checkout.tsx) saveAddress is reset to true (default ON) — verified ✅ matches PRD requirement.
computedTotal at checkout.tsx:181 correctly subtracts both cart.discount_nzd AND cart.points_discount_nzd; clamped with Math.max(0, …) before formatting — ✅.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all 4 acceptance criteria verified on mobile viewport (auto-prefill, Use new clears + reveals toggle, points apply shows summary line + cuts total, remove reverses)

seed_data_creation: Created 1 TEST_UI_Home address for buyer@example.com via in-browser fetch (token from localStorage 'allsale_token'); buyer was also seeded with 500 points balance (already in DB). Backend test class cleans up its own TEST_* addresses via fixture teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Buyer login flow: localStorage key is 'allsale_token' (value = raw JWT string, not JSON-wrapped). The Expo web preview can serve a stale bundle after edits — if frontend tests show missing testIDs that exist in source, run `sudo supervisorctl restart expo` and wait ~10s for re-bundle before failing. The buyer@example.com account currently has 500 pts + 1 TEST_UI_Home default address. Note Metro runs in CI mode (reloads disabled per /var/log/supervisor/expo.out.log).
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found. The transient 'missing components' observation was due to Metro CI-mode caching a pre-iteration bundle and was resolved by restarting the expo supervisor service.
